Shyam Christy Paul

A Senior Business Intelligence Analyst & Salesforce Marketing Cloud Developer bridging the gap between data-driven insights and marketing automation.

SFMC Admin Certified Salesforce CRM Knowledge Business Intelligence Analyst SSJS Developer SQL Specialist Python Analyst AMPScript Developer GCP BigQuery

About Me

I am a specialized **Business Intelligence Analyst** and **Salesforce Marketing Cloud Architect** with a passion for transforming raw data into automated marketing excellence. With deep expertise in the Salesforce ecosystem, I bridge the technical gap between complex data architectures and high-impact customer journeys.

Currently driving strategy for one of Australia’s largest retail supermarket chains, I leverage a powerful stack—including **GCP BigQuery, Python, SQL, and SSJS**—to architect data-driven solutions that scale. Whether I’m developing complex AMPScript for personalized communications or analyzing multi-channel campaign performance, my goal is always the same: **precision, automation, and actionable growth.**

Professional Journey

Dec. 2023 – Present

SFMC Developer / Data & Insights Specialist

Woolworths Group | Sydney, AU

  • Architected scalable **AMPscript, SSJS, and SQL** solutions for complex campaigns.
  • Optimized journeys and automations for high-volume, reliable data flows.
  • Engineered **BigQuery & SFMC SQL** for advanced segmentation and tracking.
  • Built stakeholder dashboards integrating review and feedback data insights.
  • Delivered incremental SFMC enhancements in an **Agile/Scrum** environment.
Mar. 2020 - Nov. 2023

Salesforce Administrator / Campaign Manager

Woolworths Group | Sydney, AU

  • Managed end-to-end campaigns from segmentation to post-deployment analysis.
  • Developed performance dashboards to track real-time operational metrics.
  • Standardized **SFMC best practices**, automation, and data hygiene.
  • Bridged technical and business requirements for seamless solution delivery.
April 2017 – March 2020

Automation Test Engineer

Woolworths Group | Chennai, India

  • Developed **Selenium/Java** frameworks to ensure data and functional accuracy.
  • Established core expertise in debugging and structured problem-solving.
